---
title: Project Relative SCSS Path (Subdirectory)
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      noErrors: true
      ensureCssRegexMatches:
        - ["#170229", "project-relpath-marker", "#aabb12"]
---

## Subdirectory Document

Project `_quarto.yml` uses `./styles/custom-in-styles.scss`. This doc
in `chapters/` should inherit both vapor and the custom SCSS, with
the relative path resolved from the project root.
